metadata.biological_lag_rationale: Methane from anaerobic digestion peaks ~60 days after the moisture/temperature input that triggers microbial activity. precip_lagged and decomp_lagged are applied to FOD sources (L4_MehmoodBooti, Area_SolidWaste) only. WWTPs and wastewater use contemporaneous precipitation.
fixes_applied: B: WWTP regressors — real pop_served, no circular waste_volume
C: L4 = Mehmood Booti Dumpsite (MCF=0.4), exact CSV coords
E: Reconciliation = accounting identity, not scientific validation
F: Lahore-only boundaries, no Indian districts
G: Area_SolidWaste R²<0 auto-retry without circular proxy
H: PBS Union_Council.shp — 151 real Lahore UCs, matches Transport v1.5
I: Biological lag 2 months for FOD models (precip_lagged, decomp_lagged)
J: Facility coordinate sanity check — raises error if >50km from centre
metadata.pop_weight_note: Population weights are currently area-based proxies (area_km2 / total_area). For production: replace with 2023 PBS Census UC-level population figures.
metadata.reconciliation_note: UC sum equals forecast sum by accounting identity (sum(pop_weight)=1). Not a scientific validation of spatial accuracy.

mitigation_context.rag_context: UC PB-LAH-UC088 ('Iqbal UC-01') is 'Critical' risk: 181,191 t CO2e/yr. Hotspot — Shahpur Kanjran [WWTP] accounts for 77.0% of emissions. Facility-level intervention highest ROI.
UC PB-LAH-UC108 ('Wagah UC-09') is 'Critical' risk: 241,475 t CO2e/yr. Hotspot — Mehmood Booti / Wagah Town [Dumpsite] accounts for 89.0% of emissions. Facility-level intervention highest ROI.
